title: Korean-Style Turkey Stir Fry
description: A quick and flavorful stir fry featuring turkey, ham, and a hint of Korean chili flakes.

ingredients.name: stir-fry mix
ingredients.notes: any combination of your favorite stir-fry vegetables

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of cooking oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced turkey and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Remove the turkey from the skillet and set aside.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of cooking oil to the skillet.
Add the diced ham and cook until browned, about 2-3 minutes.
Add the flaky korean chili flakes (if using) and cook for 1 minute.
Add the stir-fry mix and cook until the vegetables are tender-crisp, about 3-4 minutes.
Return the cooked turkey to the skillet and stir in the soy sauce and brown sugar.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the turkey is coated in the sauce.
Stir in the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped green onions and sesame seeds (if using).
Enjoy your delicious Korean-Style Turkey Stir Fry!
